prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of Mastercard (MA), the stock typically exhibits daily volatility of approximately 1.8-2.2%. Over a 7-day period, this translates to potential price movements of ±3-7% under normal market conditions. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum typical of established financial services companies. Confidence intervals are constructed using Monte Carlo simulation assuming log-normal price distribution with estimated volatility parameters derived from MA's historical performance patterns.
